body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Part of https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/issues/3998: ∂ᶜqʲ_err_∂ᶜqʲ in entrainment.

The evolution of Rico seems to be sensitive to details like entrainment, TKE formulation, etc. I set dt to 50s and t_end to 8 hours so that at the end of the simulation, there is a nice cloud, and the ci plots are more meaningful. Also note that I'm only changing things for 1m microphysics, as I decided to worry about 2m microphysics later.

-->

title: make entrainment implicit in 1m

body: Updates to ClimaParams v1. Needs a CloudMicrophysics release to test and merge.
title: Update to ClimaParams v1
